title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Tanker Report - February 24, 2026
summary:
Main
• VLCC: Risk Rally or Structural Shift? - Since early February, when we observed that the VLCC market appeared to be consolidating at elevated levels, freight rates have moved decisively higher , extending what was already an extraordinary rally that began in mid-January. What initially looked like a pause at multi-year highs has instead developed into a renewed upward leg , with benchmark routes firmly back in peak territory.
